author: Blockboard
title: What AI is about to expose about programmatic advertising
description: For years, the advertising industry had a convenient villain: fraud. But as AI-driven automation removes layer after layer of manual execution from media buying, the problem of structural waste is coming into focus. Partner insights from Blockboard.
content: For years, the advertising industry had a convenient villain: fraud. It was real, it was measurable and it gave everyone something to blame when performance fell short of expectations. Brands hired v… [+4357 chars]

author: Krystal Scanlon
